category_sources: source_facts.description says Denominator is a portable Java library for manipulating DNS clouds; official GitHub README says it provides portable control of DNS clouds.
display_name_sources: Official Netflix GitHub README uses Denominator as the project name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents the library and command-line version; source_facts.homepage points to the official CLI subdirectory for the packaged version.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage points inside the official Netflix/denominator GitHub repository, whose root is the official source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Netflix README identify DNS cloud manipulation, Java library usage, and a command-line version.
